calm.definition: peaceful and quiet, without worry or excitement
calm.example: We would all like to have a calm birth.

instant.example: Not everyone has an instant bond with their baby.

bond.definition: a strong feeling of closeness and connection between people
bond.example: The bond between mother and baby may take time to grow.

fairy.definition: a small magical creature in stories; a fairy story means a perfect imagined story
fairy.example: Birth is not a fairy story — it is real life.

reassurance.definition: words or actions that make you feel less worried
reassurance.example: Follow the advice that feels most like reassurance to you.

leap.definition: a big jump or a big change that feels risky
leap.example: Follow advice that does not feel like a leap too far.

measuring.definition: comparing something to a standard to see if it is good enough
measuring.example: Do not feel bad because life is not measuring up to a perfect ideal.

ideal.definition: a perfect standard that may not exist in real life
ideal.example: Life does not have to measure up to a perfect ideal.

guided.example: Being guided by reassurance will help you feel more natural.
